Random idea Draft · v0.1.0 Captured during v3 dogfooding

A glanceable health ribbon for the goals list

A thought jotted down before it evaporated — not a plan, not a commitment. Everything below is captured exactly as far as the idea has been thought through, and no further.

The idea, in one line

The goals list could carry a single glanceable health ribbon per goal — one strip of color and a couple of tokens — that tells you, without a click, whether that goal's last render is fresh, flagged for human review, or stale.

That's the whole idea. It surfaces state that already exists in the data right where the eye already is — it doesn't compute anything new, and it isn't a dashboard.

The itch that prompted it

Watching the goals list during dogfooding, the page kept feeling like it forces a click into each goal just to learn anything about its state — is the render current, did the last maker run get flagged, is a child still working? The signal is all there in the data; it just isn't surfaced where you're already looking.

What it might look like

payments-reconciliation Fresh
onboarding-rewrite Flagged for review
legacy-export Stale

A colored left-border-plus-label per row — enough to scan twenty goals and know which two need attention. Illustrative only; the exact look is not decided.

The states already exist

A goal is a living thing, and these signals are already in the data — the idea is to surface them, not to invent or recompute anything:

  • Render freshnesswhether the last render is current or has gone stale
  • Human-review flagthe human_review flag set when a maker run gets flagged
  • Dispatch in flightwhether a child is still working on the goal right now

The intended form is deliberately small

Think the colored left-border-plus-label pattern — a thin ribbon, not a panel and explicitly not a dashboard. Just enough weight to scan the list and spot the goals that need attention.

Honest about its own unknowns

These aren't oversights — they're the parts of the idea that genuinely haven't been thought through yet, and are left blank on purpose rather than invented:

  • What exactly are the states?Left blank
  • Where does the data come from?Left blank
  • Does it update live, or on load?Left blank
  • Is it even worth the visual weight?Left blank

It might be noise. It might be the single most useful thing on the page. Captured here so the idea survives long enough to find out.

random_idea · structural floor — one idea, no decisions, scope, or acceptance yet. This page surfaces the captured thought as-is.
